name: llm-graph-builder-desktop
description: Cross-platform desktop app for Neo4j LLM Graph Builder (bilingual zh/en).
author: neo4j-labs

scripts.pack: npm run build:frontend && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build:frontend && npm run prepare:resources && npm run stage:offline && electron-builder
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:frontend && npm run prepare:resources && npm run stage:offline && electron-builder --linux
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:frontend && npm run prepare:resources && npm run stage:offline && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:frontend && npm run prepare:resources && npm run stage:offline && electron-builder --mac
